summary: Tested FTRX Features (Iteration 6): Activity Chart, FTRX balance display, and Collect FTRX button. All backend endpoints working. Frontend Activity Chart working with recharts. CRITICAL ISSUE: /api/admin/wallets endpoint times out with 134 wallets due to sequential Solana RPC calls, causing frontend to show 0 wallets and hiding the Collect FTRX button.

critical.issue: Endpoint times out when fetching balances for 134 wallets - makes sequential RPC calls for SOL and FTRX balance for each wallet
critical.impact: Frontend shows 'Portfele (0)' even though 134 wallets exist in database. Distribute/Collect section (including Collect FTRX button) is hidden because wallets.length appears as 0

integration_issues.issue: Wallets don't load due to backend timeout - shows 'Portfele (0)' instead of actual count

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - recharts sizing issue when chart container not visible

endpoints_tested.notes: Returns all fields including token_holders, buys_since_sell, last_action
Returns {success: true, message: 'Collecting FTRX tokens from sub-wallets...'}
Returns {running: false, result: {success: true, total_collected_ftrx: 0, wallets_processed: 0, errors: N}}

activity_chart.title: Aktywnosc Bota
activity_chart.empty_state_message: Brak danych. Uruchom bota aby zobaczyc wykres aktywnosci.
activity_chart.chart_with_data: Shows BarChart with BUY/SELL/TRANSFER transactions when bot is running

collect_ftrx_button.reason: Button only shows when wallets.length > 1, but wallets endpoint times out

collect_sol_button.reason: Same as collect-ftrx - hidden due to wallet loading timeout

action_items: CRITICAL: Optimize /api/admin/wallets endpoint - add pagination or parallel RPC calls to prevent timeout with many wallets
Consider caching wallet balances or fetching balances asynchronously
Fix recharts console warning about chart dimensions
critical_code_review_comments: Backend volume_bot.py get_wallets_info() makes sequential RPC calls for each wallet - O(n) network calls causes timeout with 134 wallets

Frontend Admin.jsx correctly implements all FTRX features: ActivityChart component (lines 767-868), FTRX balance in wallet header (line 406), FTRX balance in wallet items (line 491), Collect FTRX button (line 450)
Backend collect_ftrx() function properly implements SPL token transfer using solders library
All data-testid attributes correctly added: activity-chart, collect-ftrx-btn, collect-sol-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: FTRX features code is correct but /api/admin/wallets endpoint times out with 134 wallets. Activity Chart works when bot is running. To test Collect FTRX button, either: 1) Fix the wallets endpoint timeout, or 2) Delete most wallets to reduce count below ~20. The distribute/collect section only appears when wallets.length > 1.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: get_wallets_info() in volume_bot.py makes 2 sequential Solana RPC calls per wallet (getBalance + getTokenAccountsByOwner). With 134 wallets, this is 268 RPC calls taking ~5 seconds each = timeout
rca_of_issue.suggested_fix: Use asyncio.gather() to parallelize RPC calls, or implement pagination, or cache balances with TTL
